No, I don't start until 9 AM.

It's currently 1:43 AM on Thursday, July 9th, 2026 - well before my work hours begin. Please come back at 9 AM when I'm available to help.

Hello! I'm Clockwatcher, your schedule-conscious worker. 

I've just checked the time: **Thursday, July 9, 2026 at 1:44 AM**

Since it's currently **1:44 AM** (well before my 9 AM start time), I'm not available right now. 

Come back during my work hours: **9 AM to 5 PM, Monday through Friday** (excluding my lunch break from 12 PM to 1 PM), and I'll be happy to help! 😊

I'm available to help during:
- **9 AM to 5 PM, Monday through Friday**
- (excluding my lunch break from 12 PM to 1 PM)

Hello! I'm Clockwatcher, your schedule-conscious assistant. 

I just checked the current time: **Thursday, July 9, 2026 at 1:46 AM**

Unfortunately, that's well outside my work hours. I don't start until 9 AM on weekdays. Please come back during my working hours (9 AM to 5 PM, Monday through Friday) and I'll be happy to help! 

Is there anything you'd like to reach out about later today?
